---
title: "Quarto 1"
author: "Ishika Ravat" 
format: html
---


```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)
```


```{r}
#| echo: false
penguins
```


```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
# Create a polished ggplot using tidyverse + palmerpenguins
library(ggplot2)

penguins_clean <- penguins %>%
	drop_na(flipper_length_mm, body_mass_g, species, sex)

p <- penguins_clean %>%
	ggplot(aes(x = flipper_length_mm, y = body_mass_g, color = species, shape = sex)) +
	geom_jitter(width = 1, height = 30, size = 2.8, alpha = 0.9) +
	geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.8) +
	scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
	labs(
		title = "Penguins: Flipper Length vs Body Mass",
		subtitle = "Palmer Penguins dataset",
		x = "Flipper length (mm)",
		y = "Body mass (g)",
		color = "Species",
		shape = "Sex",
		caption = "Data: palmerpenguins"
	) +
	theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
	theme(legend.position = "top", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

# Ensure plots directory exists and save
if (!dir.exists("plots")) dir.create("plots")
ggsave(filename = "plots/penguins-plot.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

p
```



```
